userStory: As a guest user, I want to access the Home page and use the available navigation actions, so that I can navigate to login, customer signup, clean survey, and site survey workflows.
The workflow starts by directly navigating to the application Home page at: http://localhost/washtabui/home The Home page is expected to load in guest state without authentication.
The workflow validates guest-state navigation options and transitions from the Home page to downstream pages through UI controls.

Application is launched and accessible. - User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state. - User navigates directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home. - Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.
Visibility and enabled-state validation for primary Home page controls
Navigation behavior from the Home page to:

approvedScenarios.title: Verify guest user can directly access Home page using the approved entry URL
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without prompting for authentication.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button navigates guest user to the login page URL
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the Login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button navigates guest user to customer-search workflow entry
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Clean survey button navigates guest user to vehicle-survey workflow entry
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Site survey button navigates guest user to survey workflow entry
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains survey?data.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify all approved Home page navigation controls are enabled together after page load
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: All approved Home page buttons accept interaction and none of the controls appear disabled, blocked, or non-clickable.

validations: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without prompting for authentication.
The application transitions from the Home page to the Login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.
The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.
The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.
The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains survey?data.
All approved Home page buttons accept interaction and none of the controls appear disabled, blocked, or non-clickable.
transitions: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without prompting for authentication.
The application transitions from the Home page to the Login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.
The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow entry page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.
The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.
The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow entry page and the browser URL contains survey?data.
All approved Home page buttons accept interaction and none of the controls appear disabled, blocked, or non-clickable.

wrapperExpectations: Reuse approved shared/common wrapper keywords before low-level SeleniumLibrary actions.
Do not invent suite-level custom keywords; compose from approved upstream resource knowledge.

mustNotInvent: duplicate ownership for controls already owned in approved upstream resources
hardcoded workflow routing or mapped page logic in Python
downstreamGuidance.generationRule: Downstream generation must consume approved workflow knowledge plus approved resource context before creating new artifacts.
